minor.comment: Add SandboxBridge.onState() subscription API, SandboxStateUpdateDetail type, and harden bridge messages against superseded-document races via a render generation tag
minor.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

minor.comment: render() now rejects with SandboxTimeoutError if no 'ready' signal arrives within 5s, in all builds (previously a dev-only warning that never rejected). Superseded renders and dispose() still resolve, not reject.
minor.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

minor.comment: Add setStateAll batch API, lang/title document options, SandboxError base class, and harden CSP/postMessage security
minor.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
